unserved_road_policy.source_note: Not every road is depicted on the official map; unserved destinations require transfer to tricycle or on foot.

routes.name: West and East Loop
routes.description: Crossing Dumalagan ↔ F. Durano & South Montilla Blvd via JC Aquino Ave, Bancasi Airport, and city-proper loop (former R1+R2).

routes.name: City Loop via Airport
routes.description: Butuan Integrated Jeepney Terminal ↔ Crossing Dumalagan via city loop, Langihan, Rosales, JC Aquino, Bancasi (former R4).

routes.name: Ampayon to Libertad
routes.description: Ampayon Triangle ↔ Libertad Overpass via JC Aquino Ave (former R10).

routes.name: De Oro to City Proper
termini: De Oro Barangay Hall Off-Street Terminal
routes.description: De Oro Barangay Hall ↔ Butuan Integrated Jeepney Terminal (former R7).

ordered_stops.name: De Oro Barangay Hall Off-Street Terminal

routes.name: Santo Niño to City Proper
termini: Santo Niño Barangay Hall Off-Street Terminal
routes.description: Santo Niño Barangay Hall ↔ Butuan Integrated Jeepney Terminal (former R8).

ordered_stops.name: Santo Niño Barangay Hall Off-Street Terminal

routes.name: Maguinda to Provincial Capitol
termini: Agusan del Norte Provincial Capitol Off-Street Terminal
routes.description: Maguinda Covered Court ↔ Agusan del Norte Provincial Capitol via Las Nieves Rd and Montilla Blvd (new route).

ordered_stops.name: Agusan del Norte Provincial Capitol Off-Street Terminal

routes.name: Tungao to Provincial Capitol
termini: Agusan del Norte Provincial Capitol Off-Street Terminal
routes.description: Tungao ↔ Agusan del Norte Provincial Capitol via Butuan City-Malaybalay Rd, Montilla Blvd, Rosales (former R12).

ordered_stops.name: Agusan del Norte Provincial Capitol Off-Street Terminal
